OM TAT SAT

An Index of Technical Terms
Adhipati —Lord.
Adhipatya —Lordship.
Apoklima —3, 6, 9 and 12 Houses.
Arudha —The sign which is distant from
the lord as the lord is from
house concerned.
Bala —Strength.
Balarishta —Death in childhood.
Bhachakra —Zodiac.
Bhava —House or signification.
Bhrathrukaraka —Indicator of brothers—Mars
Budha —Mercury.
Budha Dasa —Mercury's period.
Bhukti —Sub or Minor period.
Chandra —The Moon.
Chandra Dasa —The Moon's period.
Chandra Mangala Yoga —Angular disposition between
the Moon and Mars.
Chara Rasis —Movable signs, e.g., Aries,
Cancer, etc.
Dasa —Period.
Dhanakaraka —Indicator of wealth—Jupiter.
Dhanus —Sagittarius.
Divya Drishti —Intuitive perception.
Drekkana —1/3 division of a sign.
Dusthana —An evil place.

302 How to Judge a Horoscope
Dwiswabhava Rasis —Common signs, e.g., Gemini.
Dwirdwadasa —2nd and 12th from each other.
